org.apache.dubbo.remoting

接口 Dispatcher

  • 所有已知子接口:
    Dispatcher
    所有已知实现类:
    AllDispatcher, AllDispatcher2, ConnectionOrderedDispatcher, DirectDispatcher, ExecutionDispatcher, MessageOnlyDispatcher

    @SPI(value="all")
public interface Dispatcher
    ChannelHandlerWrapper (SPI, Singleton, ThreadSafe)

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 抽象方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      ChannelHandler dispatch(ChannelHandler handler, URL url)
      dispatch the message to threadpool.

    • 方法详细资料

      • dispatch

        @Adaptive(value={"dispatcher","dispather","channel.handler"})
ChannelHandler dispatch(ChannelHandler handler,
                                                                                      URL url)
        dispatch the message to threadpool.
        参数:
        handler -
        url -
        返回:
        channel handler
